voice_guidelines.sentence_style: short and punchy, mix of fragments and full sentences
voice_guidelines.personality: knowledgeable friend who happens to be an expert

target_audience.secondary: gift shoppers looking for reliable products

formatting_rules.capitalization: sentence case for descriptions, title case for product titles
formatting_rules.bullet_style: start with a benefit, then explain the feature
formatting_rules.description_opener: never start with the brand name or product name directly
